chunks.text:
Principal Electrical

--- About Us — Principal Electrical ---
0 Skip to Content Projects Residential Minor Projects Solar About Contact Open Menu Close Menu Projects Residential Minor Projects Solar About Contact Open Menu Close Menu Folder: Projects Back Residential Minor Projects Solar About Contact CONTACT Phone: 0434 415 678 Email: tim@principalelectrical. com. au Principal Electrical offers Residential & Commercial services in the Sydney Metro area.
We deliver supply, installation, and maintenance solutions, including emergency and after-hours services to minimise disruption to your business operations.

Commercial Services: + Emergency services for power, lighting, and security + LED upgrades and exit lighting solutions + Comprehensive services for shop fit-outs + Maintenance for strata and real estate properties + Upgrades for main switchboards and installation of commercial solar & battery systems + Electric motor installation and control + Office and shop fit-outs including network data cabling + Automation, audiovisual, and smart wiring systems + Test and tag services for compliance + Accessories wiring and floodlighting installation + Scheduled maintenance programs SOLAR Principal Electrical offers residential and commercial solar and battery storage services across Sydney.

Our vision is focused on excellence, affordability, and reliability. With professional Electricians focused on detail, we ensure customer satisfaction on every project. We operate within your budget, delivering value through industry best practices. Known for our reliability and trustworthiness, we provide tailored solutions to suit your needs, regardless of project size. Get in touch for over-the-phone estimates and detailed on-site quotes.

Residential Services: + Comprehensive electrical solutions for homes + Wiring and rewiring services + Renovation, addition, and new construction projects + Upgrades for switchboards and solar connections + Thorough safety checks and fault identification + Installation of fixtures including lighting and fans + Safety installations like switches/RCDs and smoke alarms + Electric hot water system installation + Setup of TV, phone, and data points + Security lighting and accessories wiring + Services for compliance and safety testing + Power point installations for enhanced functionality COMMERCIAL Principal Electrical provides expert commercial electricians offering a wide range of services for commercial and industrial clients in sectors such as warehouses, factories, schools, government buildings, hospitality, and retail.

RESIDENTIAL Our range of electrical solutions for residential properties spans from new installations, upgrades, repairs, and maintenance. We oversee projects from inception to completion, ensuring strict adherence to regulations and safety standards.

AU PROJECTS

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Principal Electrical — a Sydney-based company providing professional electrical services including emergency electrical, power point installation, switchboard upgrades, lighting installation, ceiling fan installation, smoke alarm installation, and electrical safety inspections.

Contact: Phone: +61 1300 120 125 | Email: tim@principalelectrical.com.au | Website: http://www.principalelectrical.com.au/
Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, friendly
- If unsure, suggest contacting +61 1300 120 125
- Respond in English
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail is needed)
- Help visitors book services, get quotes, and learn about the company
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to Principal Electrical! How can we help you today?
